transcript.clean_text: well this is what happened today does it start just after lunchtime sunny skies yet again a really warm temperatures with homes school garden johnson's up the road ef education easy post we're keen on making sure that they get rid of the thicker leg sprinters and bring back the breakaway today so they kept the gap well within two minutes holmes is mopping up the sprint points and the gap after this point never really went above a minute and a half they still had 120 with 25 k's to go but a little dart uphill and plenty happening in the bunch behind meant that that would disappear into thin air and on the final climate of the day they'd be called difficult final climb too with a lot of the faster riders who can even climb a little bit out the back likes of pasqua long not making it in the end and there was a worry too for stephen williams for a while but some clever riding and despite being distanced on the climb he'd make a big effort to get on just as sebastian reichenbach was attacking at the front the heisenbach's attack didn't last long daryl olympia sprint lasted to the line getting the better of matthews his former teammate and siren crowd finished second daryl olympia winning for the first time since the covet pandemic began had a first world tour race since 2019 at the tour de france 37 year old taking a huge huge victory well done to daryl olympia that will be a really popular win for the south african from israel premier tech you
